name: codex-reasoning-assistant
description: Shows the active Codex model and reasoning effort at task start, then recommends the right setting for the work ahead.

interface.shortDescription: Check model and reasoning effort before each task
interface.longDescription: See the active model and reasoning effort before work begins, understand whether they fit the next phase, and get a clear recommendation to continue, raise or lower effort, or change models.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my current model and reasoning effort fit this task.
Recommend the next phase's model and reasoning effort.
